GlobalConfig.description: Banshee global configuration file. Defines GitHub authentication, runtime options, and default values used across all migrations.

options.description: Runtime behaviour options controlling logging, caching, progress, and merge strategy.

defaults.description: Default values used when a migration config does not provide them.

GlobalConfig.title: GlobalConfig

Defaults.description: Default values applied when a migration config does not supply them.

git_email.description: Author email used in git commits.

git_name.description: Author name used in git commits.

organisation.description: Default GitHub organisation slug used when a migration config does not specify one.

code_reviewer.description: Team slug added as a PR reviewer when assign_code_reviewer_if_none_assigned is true.

Defaults.title: Defaults

Github.description: GitHub authentication configuration. Use either a Personal Access Token or GitHub App credentials.

use_github_app.description: When true, authenticates using GitHub App credentials (app_id, app_installation_id, app_private_key_filepath) instead of a Personal Access Token.

token.description: Personal Access Token with repo, read:org, and pull_request scopes. Rate limit: 5,000 req/hr.

app_id.description: GitHub App ID. Only used when use_github_app is true.

app_installation_id.description: GitHub App installation ID for the target organisation. Only used when use_github_app is true.

app_private_key_filepath.description: Path to the GitHub App private key PEM file. Only used when use_github_app is true.

Github.title: Github

log_level.description: Verbosity of log output. Valid values: debug, info, warn, error. Default: info.

assign_code_reviewer_if_none_assigned.description: When true, assigns the defaults.code_reviewer team as a PR reviewer if no reviewers are assigned automatically via CODEOWNERS.

show_git_output.description: When true, prints output from git operations (clone, pull, fetch) to the console.

ignore_directories.description: Directory names skipped during file-matching actions (replace, yaml, json). Does not affect run_command.

concurrency.description: Number of repositories to clone and migrate in parallel. Requires cache_repos.enabled: true. Can be overridden at runtime with the -j / --concurrency flag. Default: 1.

cache_repos.description: Configuration for persistent on-disk repo caching.

save_progress.description: Configuration for progress tracking, allowing migrations to be stopped and resumed.

merging.description: Configuration for the merge command behaviour.

CacheRepos.description: Persistent repo cache settings. When enabled, repos are cloned once and reused across migrations by pulling the latest default branch changes before each run.

enabled.description: When true, repos are cloned once and stored on disk for reuse. Required for concurrency > 1.

directory.description: Filesystem path for storing the cloned repos cache.

CacheRepos.title: CacheRepos

strategy.description: Merge strategy for the merge command. Valid values: merge, squash, rebase.

append_title.description: String appended to the merge commit title. Useful for skipping CI (e.g. "[CI SKIP]").

SaveProgress.description: Progress tracking settings. Progress files are serialised JSON and can be edited by hand to rerun or skip specific repos.

enabled.description: When true, migration progress is tracked on disk so runs can be stopped and resumed.

directory.description: Filesystem path for storing progress files.

batch.description: Number of repos to process per run. Use -1 to disable batching and process all repos in one run.

SaveProgress.title: SaveProgress
